title: Global agent status manager with WebSocket broadcasting
purpose: Manages and broadcasts agent status updates across WebSocket clients and local listeners. Used to track agent activity state and communicate changes in real-time.
module_context: Exports a singleton StatusManager instance that maintains agent status state and handles WebSocket communication and local event subscription.

steps.content: Store the provided WebSocket handler for future status broadcasting.
Replace any existing WebSocket handler with the new one.
Update the internal status state with the new status and optional message.
Record the current timestamp as the last activity time.
IF a WebSocket handler is configured, broadcast the status update to connected clients.
Notify all registered local listeners of the status change.
Construct and return a status response object with current status.
Include the optional message if present.
Format and include the last activity timestamp as an ISO string.
Add the provided listener function to the list of subscribers.
Return an unsubscribe function that removes the listener from the list.
Retrieve the current status state as a response object.
Call each listener with the current status.
IF a listener throws an error, log the error but continue notifying other listeners.
